_doc: Single source of truth for external runtime dependencies. Used by tools/build-importmaps.mjs and tools/vendor.mjs. The CDN major-version pin should match the major version that npm install actually resolves into node_modules; otherwise CDN mode and offline mode behave differently. List entries even for deps used by components that aren't yet in web/sol-full.js — the importmap covers them so the offline page won't 404 when a component is added. A `umd` field, when set, tells vendor.mjs to additionally emit a `<flat-name>.umd.js` bundle exposing the dep at `window.<umd>` — used for `<script>`-tag drop-in (e.g. sol-login + the inrupt auth client).
